name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, blend together the cream cheese, crunchy peanut butter, and confectioners sugar until smooth.
2. Gently fold in the Cool Whip until just combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared graham cracker crust.
4. Chill the pie in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
